goal: Lock the five interface contracts that all workers depend on before any API wiring begins.
constraints: No worker starts API wiring until this task is Done
Contracts must be written as JSON in this file under the key matching each contract name
Decisions are binding — reopen only via a Blocked escalation with coordinator approval
done_criteria: base_url contract locked: env var name, fallback value, and precedence rule written
chat_transport contract locked: send endpoint, stream endpoint, message schema, reconnect rule written
health contract locked: four status values and their conditions written
history contract locked: list shape, limit param, item summary fields written
connect contract locked: supported platform list, per-platform content source, completion state written
escalation_rules: Escalate to human if OpenFang API is unreachable and contract cannot be verified empirically
Escalate if any two workers dispute ownership of the same field in the same contract

output_contract.format: JSON document embedded in this file under key 'decisions'

base_url.note: All client calls use this single source of truth.  Never hardcode the host.

chat_transport.reconnect_rule: Retry after 2 s on network error.  Stop after 3 consecutive failures.  Surface error state to UI.

health.connected: API reachable AND at least one agent responds within 5 s
health.degraded: API reachable BUT last agent call failed or timed out
health.offline: API not reachable (connection refused or timeout at network layer)
health.unknown: Health check not yet attempted or result is stale (> 30 s old)

history.pagination: limit-only for v1; no cursor needed

connect.content_source: Static JSON per platform in lib/platform-meta.js
connect.completion_state: Platform is 'connected' when its entry exists in GET /api/channels
